---
title: "Teaching"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

::: {.page-intro}
I teach statistics and scientific computing at **ENSAI Rennes**. Pick a course below to
browse its slides, lecture notes, exercises, exams and interactive notebooks — in French
and English where available.
:::

::: {.aurora-card-grid}

<a class="aurora-card" href="hypothesis_testing/index.qmd">
<span class="aurora-card__icon">📊</span>
<span class="aurora-card__title">Hypothesis Testing</span>
<span class="aurora-card__desc">Testing models, classical tests on Gaussian populations, goodness-of-fit, dependency, and multiple testing.</span>
<span class="aurora-card__meta">
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--inst">ENSAI</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--level">M1</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--lang">Fr</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--lang">En</span>
</span>
<span class="aurora-card__more">View course →</span>
</a>

<a class="aurora-card" href="linear_model/index.qmd">
<span class="aurora-card__icon">📈</span>
<span class="aurora-card__title">Linear &amp; Generalized Linear Models</span>
<span class="aurora-card__desc">From the linear model — inference, validation, selection, ANOVA — through logistic, categorical and counting GLMs.</span>
<span class="aurora-card__meta">
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--inst">ENSAI</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--level">M2</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--lang">Fr</span>
</span>
<span class="aurora-card__more">View course →</span>
</a>

<a class="aurora-card" href="parallel_computing/index.qmd">
<span class="aurora-card__icon">⚡</span>
<span class="aurora-card__title">Parallel Computing</span>
<span class="aurora-card__desc">High-performance computing in Julia: compilation &amp; types, multiple dispatch, threads and concurrency, memory and the GPU.</span>
<span class="aurora-card__meta">
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--inst">ENSAI</span>
<span class="aurora-badge aurora-badge--lang">Fr</span>
</span>
<span class="aurora-card__more">View course →</span>
</a>

:::
